title: TE Connectivity's (TEL) CEO Terrence Curtin on Q2 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE:TEL ) Q2 2021 Earnings Conference Call April 27, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Sujal Shah – Vice President of Investor Relations Terrence Curtin – Chief Executive Officer Heath Mitts – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Chris Snyder – UBS David Kelley – Jefferies Mark Delaney – Goldman Sachs Wamsi Mohan – Bank of America Amit Daryanani – Evercore Samik Chatterjee – J.P.

title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Q2 Earnings & Sales Beat, Rise Y/Y
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fiscal second-quarter results reflect benefits from solid momentum across communications and industrial solutions.

title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: TE Connectivity (TEL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.85% and 5.24%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: TE Connectivity (TEL) to Post Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fiscal second-quarter results are expected to reflect gains from strength across the Transportation, Industrial and Communication segments.

title: 4 Electronics Stocks to Escape Pandemic-Led Disruptions
text: The pandemic-led disruptions hurt the Zacks Electronics-Miscellaneous Components industry. Industry players like TEL, LFUS, BWXT and CTS are set to gain from IoT and automation prospects.

title: 2 Dividend-Paying Tech Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: These stocks offer long-term upside and a nice stream of income.
